text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On New Year's day, Rice Shower invites me to
visit a shrine with her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Big Brother. I've decided what to pray for.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Big Sister. I've decided what to pray for.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Can I tell you?
choice_data_list: You want to tell me? Not the gods?
You want to tell me? Not the gods?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes. This is something I have to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes. This is something I have to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to race in the spring Tenno Sho next.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Because I want to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho... is a race all stayers dream
of... right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That means it's a place... where lots of great
racers gather.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little scared, but I have to push through. I
have to keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: For both my sake... and Bourbon's.
choice_data_list: You've thought about this a lot, huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I've always wanted to become a blue rose
that brings happiness.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But just saying it isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I want to stop bringing sadness to the people
around me, then I should do something about it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'll have to run the ultimate race as
Bourbon's rival.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I need to be strong enough to pull off a
miracle—to make the impossible possible.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Rice is going to race in the spring Tenno Sho,
then she has to get used to races of the same
length first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, we'll set our sights on the 2500-meter
turf Nikkei Sho in the spring. As for our goal...
choice_data_list:
Let's get you into the top three at the Nikkei
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, we have a new goal for the new year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To make the most of her enthusiasm, she decides
to write out her New Year's resolution on a
wooden prayer tablet.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I'm going to do my best!
choice_data_list: I think you've made a pretty great wish.
I think you've made a pretty great wish.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Me too! I'm so glad we came here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Me too! I'm so glad we came here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now it's your turn.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now it's your turn.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll wish with you. I'm sure it'll be granted.
choice_data_list: I hope everyone can be healthy.
I want to continue supporting your career.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I also want Bourbon's injury to heal
quickly.
choice_data_list: I want you to stay healthy too, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Understood. Well, I don't want to make
you worry, so I'll be careful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We fill up on nutrients at the nearby food stalls
before we go and start training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I don't know how to respond when you say
something so nice...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... But I don't have time to cry. I... have to work hard... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I comfort Rice Shower for a little while, we
head off to start training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You want to be stronger, huh? Um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Can I help with that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We can go to the gym together... or do partner
running...
choice_data_list: That's not quite what I was thinking.
That's not quite what I was thinking.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Well, if I can do anything to help... let me know.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll do anything I can to help you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll do anything I can to help you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the weight of Rice Shower's
consideration for me the whole way back to
campus.
